description: Streak Dots Tile Layout — Wrap each streak (Burn Streak, Supernova Streak) in a card tile matching StatCard styling and integrate into the 2-column stat grid on web and mobile

userStories.title: Restyle web StreakDots as a card tile component
userStories.description: As a user, I want the streak dots displayed inside a styled card tile so they visually match the surrounding stat tiles.
acceptanceCriteria: StreakDots component (`apps/web/src/components/StreakDots.tsx`) renders inside a container with the same styling as StatCard: `rounded-lg border border-gray-700 bg-surface px-4 py-3.5`
Layout is stacked vertically: streak label + count (`🔥 {count} {label}`) on top row, 7 dots on second row
Remove day-of-week labels (S, M, T, W, T, F, S) below each dot — just show the 7 dots in a row
Both `orange` (Burn Streak) and `violet` (Supernova Streak) color variants render correctly
Danger state (red) still displays correctly within the tile
When `last7Days` is empty, show tile with 0 count and all ○ dots
Typecheck passes (`cd packages/shared && yarn build && cd ../../apps/web && yarn typecheck`)

userStories.title: Integrate web streak tiles into stat grid on all 3 pages
userStories.description: As a user, I want the streak tiles to be part of the same 2-column grid as the other stat tiles so the layout looks cohesive.
acceptanceCriteria: On burn buddy detail page (`apps/web/src/app/(main)/burn-buddies/[id]/page.tsx`): remove the separate `mb-5 flex flex-col gap-2` StreakDots wrapper. Place both StreakDots as the first two children inside the existing `grid grid-cols-2 gap-3` grid, before the StatCard elements
On burn squad detail page (`apps/web/src/app/(main)/burn-squads/[id]/page.tsx`): same change — streak tiles as first two cells in the stat grid
On friend profile page (`apps/web/src/app/(main)/profile/[uid]/page.tsx`): same change — streak tiles as first two cells in the stat grid
Streak tiles occupy one grid cell each (single column, not spanning 2 columns)
Remove any conditional `streaks.last7Days.length > 0` wrapping around StreakDots — always show tiles (empty state handled by component)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Restyle mobile StreakDots as a card tile
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the streak dots displayed inside a styled card tile matching the mobile stat cards.
acceptanceCriteria: StreakDots component (`apps/mobile/src/components/StreakDots.tsx`) renders inside a container matching mobile statCard style: `backgroundColor: '#fafafa'`, `borderRadius: 10`, `padding: 14`, `borderWidth: 1`, `borderColor: '#f1f5f9'`, `width: '47%'`
Layout is stacked vertically: label + count on top row, 7 dots on bottom row
Remove day-of-week labels below each dot — just show the 7 dots
Both orange and violet variants render correctly
Danger state (red) still works within the tile
When `last7Days` is empty, show tile with 0 count and all ○ dots
Mobile typecheck passes (`cd apps/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit`)

userStories.title: Integrate mobile streak tiles into stat grid on both screens
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the streak tiles to be part of the same grid as the other stat tiles.
acceptanceCriteria: On BurnBuddyDetailScreen (`apps/mobile/src/screens/BurnBuddyDetailScreen.tsx`): remove the separate `streakDotsSection` wrapper. Place both StreakDots as the first two children inside the existing `statsGrid` View, before the other statCard Views
On BurnSquadDetailScreen (`apps/mobile/src/screens/BurnSquadDetailScreen.tsx`): same change — streak tiles as first two items in the statsGrid
Remove any conditional `streaks.last7Days.length > 0` wrapping around StreakDots — always show tiles
Mobile typecheck passes (`cd apps/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit`)
